# DinarExchange

> Real-time official and parallel market exchange rates for the Algerian Dinar (DZD).

DinarExchange is a Progressive Web App (PWA) that provides real-time exchange rates for the Algerian Dinar, covering both the official banking rate (via Frankfurter API) and the parallel/informal market rate (Square Port-Saïd d'Alger).

## Features

- **Dual Market Rates**: Official (banking) rates from Frankfurter API and parallel (square) market rates side-by-side.
- **Currency Converter**: Convert any currency to DZD and vice-versa using either official or parallel rates.
- **Historical Charts**: 7-day, 30-day, and 90-day rate history with interactive canvas charts.
- **Favorites System**: Star your most-used currencies for quick access.
- **Offline-First PWA**: Works fully offline with cached data. Installable on mobile and desktop.
- **Auto-Updates**: Built-in update mechanism that checks for new versions without losing user data.

## Tech Stack

- Vanilla JavaScript (ES Modules, no framework)
- CSS custom properties design system
- Canvas API for charts
- Service Worker for offline caching
- LocalStorage for user preferences

## Tracked Currencies

USD, EUR, GBP, CHF, CAD, AED, SAR, CNY, TRY, TND, MAD, JPY

## API Sources

- **Official rates**: [Frankfurter API](https://www.frankfurter.app/) (European Central Bank data)
- **Parallel rates**: Local `parallel.json` (Square Port-Saïd estimates)

## Developer
